product.applications: Softening, demineralization, boiler feed water treatment
product.specs: Uniform bead size, exchange capacity, low fines, process stability
product.overview: Ion exchange resins are used for softening, demineralization, and polishing in boiler and process water systems.
product.technicalNotes: Select resin type and bead size from the process water analysis and operating cycle requirements.
product.documentation: CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
product.datasheet: Use for water treatment systems where controlled demineralization or softening is required.
